title: dreamlab - Creative Technology & AI Innovation Studio. Manchester, Liverpool, London
text:
CREATIVE

Labs across Manchester · Liverpool · Cumbria · London
dreamlab is a creative technology agency amplifying human creativity with AI, real-time computing & software engineering.
We create next generation pipelines for film, games, advertising and immersive entertainment — partnering with brands, studios, and IP owners to create new possibilities.

Creative Tech
dreamlab is a creative technology agency based at labs across Manchester, Liverpool, Cumbria and London — exploring and developing products, services and experiences at the cutting edge of technology and creativity.
We bring together over
48
deep tech specialists across AI, immersive experiences, virtual production, games, film, music, animation, and more. Working with businesses of all sizes, from SMEs to global brands, we help organisations harness emerging technology to build something genuinely new.
Meet the team
What we do

AI agents, LLMs and RAG systems alongside creative content workflows for video, image and audio — intelligent automation that transforms how your organisation operates.
